specs.case_material: Injected aluminum alloy top and injected ABS plastic bottom
specs.fan_control: Actively controlled by the Raspberry Pi OS
specs.gpio_access: Full GPIO Access with Magnetic cover
specs.m2_nvme_options: SINGLE M.2 NVMe PCIe Expansion Board or DUAL M.2 NVMe PCIe Expansion Board
specs.screws_included: 8 pcs Flat head 2.5x6 screws, 4 pcs Round head 2.5x8 screws
specs.audio: 3.5mm combo jack (audio out + mic in via HS100B DAC)
specs.thermal_interface: Silicon thermal pads + Argon THRML M.2 heatsink

snapshot.description: Premium aluminium case for Raspberry Pi 5 with integrated M.2 NVMe PCIe storage support via the PCIe FPC connector. Features passive aluminium heatsink body, programmable power button, and repositioned full-size HDMI and USB-C ports. Compatible with Raspberry Pi 5 only.
features: Full-size HDMI ports (2x)
PWM-controlled 30mm fan
Programmable power button with safe shutdown
40-pin GPIO passthrough header
All ports rear-facing for clean cable management
2 Front USB
1 Front 3.5 mm audio IN/OUT
Blower-type 30mm PWM fan for superior airflow
Integrated HS100B DAC for 3.5mm audio out and mic in
Integrated FE1.1S USB hub chip (2 additional front USB 2.0 ports)
Silicon thermal pads for CPU, RP1, PMIC, RAM, and M.2 drives
Argon THRML M.2 NVMe heatsink included
Supports M.2 NVMe sizes 2230, 2242, 2260, 2280
Optional M.2 NVMe expansion boards (single, dual, quad configurations)
Optional Argon Industria V5 OLED Module (1.8-inch display)
Optional Argon Industria V5 ZigBee Module for Home Assistant
USB 3.0 Type-A ports (2x rear-facing)
USB 2.0 Type-A ports (2x front-facing)
Gigabit Ethernet passthrough
3.5mm combo audio jack (audio out + mic in)
Aluminum alloy top with ABS plastic bottom
Magnetic GPIO cover included
